description: A previous researcher used sticky notes to track reading priority, but now you want to standardize on Zotero's tagging system. Standardize the library by replacing child notes containing "Status: Urgent" with the tag 'priority:high' and child notes containing "Status: Later" with the tag 'priority:low'. Delete the redundant status notes after tagging, ensuring that papers with other types of notes, such as "Key reference", remain unmodified.

control_papers: On the Electrodynamics of Moving Bodies
